zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen於1275年出生在威爾士安格萊米德時，他的父親Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED80歲，母親Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield45歲。他和GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他在英國威爾斯尼德被列為guarda florestal de snowdon。他去世於1331年12月11日在英國威爾斯尼德享年56歲，埋葬在威爾士安格萊利安法斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen于1275年出生在威尔士安格萊米德时，他的父亲Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED80岁，母亲Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield45岁。他和GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他在英国威尔斯尼德被列为guarda florestal de snowdon。他去世于1331年12月11日在英国威尔斯尼德享年56岁，埋葬在威尔士安格萊利安法斯。

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Serge, Henri, Pierre, Alide, Andre, Antoine, Benoit, Berthony, Chantal, Daphnee, Edouard, Guilene.

French and Mauritian (Théodore); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Théodore); English and Welsh: from a personal name derived from Greek Theodōros, a compound of theos ‘God’ + dōron ‘gift’, which was relatively popular in the Middle Ages because of its auspicious meaning. The name was borne by several early Christian saints. There was considerable confusion with the ancient Germanic name Theodoric (see Terry ). In Wales, the personal name Theodore was also adopted as an approximation to the Welsh name Tewdwr (see Tudor ). In North America, this surname has absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Greek Theodorakis , Macedonian Todorovski, and Serbian Todorović (see Todorovic ).

variants.name: Tedder
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Thedere, Teddere, which is either from the Old English personal name Thēodhere (from thēod ‘people’ + here ‘army’) or from the cognate ancient Germanic personal name Theudher, which seems to have been adopted by the Normans. Alternatively, perhaps it may be an occupational name from Middle English teddere ‘one who teds’, i.e. a person whose occupation was to spread mown grass for drying.

nameMeanings.name: Hen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 田 based on its pronunciation of the Siyi Cantonese subdialect (also known as Sze Yup or Four Districts dialect including Taishanese) spoken in southern Guangdong, see   Tian   1.

variants.name: Heinrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Helmut, Manfred, Otto, Dieter, Hans, Christl, Ewald, Gerd, Gerhard, Guenter.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Heinrich, composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power’ (see also Henry ). In the Middle Ages this was the most popular of personal names in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen was born in 1275, in Penmynydd, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, was 80 and his mother, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, was 45. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR. His occupation is listed as guarda florestal de snowdon in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. He died on 11 December 1331, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen est né en 1275, à Penmynydd, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, avait 80 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR. Sa profession de son indiquée est guarda florestal de snowdon à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1331, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen 1275 in Penmynydd, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED 80 und seine Mutter Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield 45. Er hatte mit GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als guarda florestal de snowdon in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1331 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen è nato il nel 1275 nel Penmynydd, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, aveva 80 anni e il suo madre, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR. La sua occupazione è indicata come guarda florestal de snowdon nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 dicembre 1331, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Henが1275年にウェールズアングレセイペンムイニーッドで生まれた時，父Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFEDは80歳，母Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefieldは45歳であった。彼はGWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWRとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。イギリスウェールズグウイネッドでの職業はguarda florestal de snowdonと記録されている。彼は1331年12月11日にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで56歳で死去し，ウェールズアングレセイランファスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen(이)가 1275년 웨일스 앤글레시 펜미니드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED(은)는 80세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield(은)는 45세였다. 그는 GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 guarda florestal de snowdon이었다. 그는 1331년 12월 11일 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 앤글레시 랜파이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen nasceu em 1275, em Penmynydd, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tinha 80 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR. Sua profissão aparece como guarda florestal de snowdon em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1331, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Llanfaes, Anglesey, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen родился в 1275 г. в местности пенминидд, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED было 80 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, 45. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR.  Он работал по профессии guarda florestal de snowdon в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер 11 декабря 1331 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности лланфаесь, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen nació en 1275, en Penmynydd, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tenía 80 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR. Su ocupación registrada era guarda florestal de snowdon en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1331, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Llanfaes, Isla Oscura, Gales.
